constraint_a.statement: The selected color regime must match the emotional truth of the target arc stage.

constraint_b.statement: The scene should preserve project palette continuity and recognizable brand chroma.

questions.tension: Brand palette consistency can conflict with the emotional truth of the arc stage.
questions.failure_scenario: Muted or misaligned color energy destroys the intended peak or softness of the beat.
resolution_demands: State whether arc-stage emotional accuracy overrides brand palette continuity.
Name the precedence rule that authorizes that decision.
Name the final archetype or color regime that will be used.
downstream_proof: Provide the resolved PAD arousal value.
Confirm compatibility with the target CLS state.

downstream_consumer.expected_input: A scene packet whose color profile is emotionally valid for the arc stage.
downstream_consumer.failure_mode: Scene Builder emits a visually polished but structurally false beat.

automated_checks.repair_hint: Shift the color archetype until PAD arousal matches the arc target.

constraint_a.statement: A vulnerability beat must remain inside the warm temperature band.

constraint_b.statement: The beat must break at least one expectation established by the previous beat.
constraint_b.source: CMF_Master_Scene_Intelligence.md#The Unpredictability Gate Applied to Composition

questions.tension: Vulnerability warmth can conflict with Law 4 unpredictability across adjacent beats.
questions.failure_scenario: Adjacent scenes collapse into the same temperature signature and the emotional shift becomes invisible.
resolution_demands: Name the precedence rule that resolves warmth versus surprise.
Describe how it differs perceptibly from the previous beat while preserving emotional accuracy.
downstream_proof: Provide the pleasure delta from the previous beat.
Confirm the delta clears the perceptual threshold.

downstream_consumer.expected_input: A beat color profile with a valid sequence-level delta and preserved emotional class.
downstream_consumer.failure_mode: Manifest carries two adjacent beats that feel emotionally identical despite different narrative roles.

automated_checks.repair_hint: Increase temperature separation without breaking the vulnerability warmth band.

constraint_a.statement: The selected motion should maximize felt presence for the beat.

constraint_b.statement: The motion effect must remain inside the cognitive load budget of the beat.

questions.tension: High-presence motion can violate the CLS budget of soft scenes.
questions.failure_scenario: The viewer enters processing mode when the beat needed feeling mode.
resolution_demands: Choose the highest-presence motion effect that still fits the CLS budget.
Name the precedence rule that determines when CLS budget defeats raw presence.
downstream_proof: Show CLS plus content arousal remains under the overload threshold.

downstream_consumer.expected_input: A motion profile that is both expressive and cognitively survivable.
downstream_consumer.failure_mode: Prompt compilation carries a visually impressive motion instruction that overloads the target beat.

automated_checks.repair_hint: Select a lower-cost motion effect or simplify scene content.

constraint_a.statement: The cut rhythm should respect the selected music cadence.

constraint_b.statement: The beat pacing must preserve the correct emotional register.

questions.tension: Music BPM can demand a cut rhythm that breaks the emotional pacing of the beat.
questions.failure_scenario: The scene becomes musically busy and emotionally false.
resolution_demands: Choose beat-sync, phrase-sync, or a hybrid strategy.
State the precedence rule that decides between rhythm purity and emotional truth.
State why the chosen strategy preserves the emotional register.
downstream_proof: Confirm all cut offsets remain inside the AV sync window.

downstream_consumer.expected_input: An AV timing plan whose rhythm strategy is explicit and legally synchronized.
downstream_consumer.failure_mode: Audio engine receives an incoherent timing plan and bakes false emotional pacing into the manifest.

automated_checks.repair_hint: Retime audio or scene cuts until sync falls inside the valid binding window.

gates.name: Kuleshov Sequencing vs Excitation Transfer Timing

constraint_a.statement: Every local scene decision may appear valid in isolation.

constraint_b.statement: The full sequence must remain coherent across Kuleshov flow, excitation timing, emotional count, and ending allocation.

questions.tension: Local scene decisions can still produce a globally incoherent sequence.
questions.failure_scenario: Meaning flow, excitation zones, or the final VISION allocation break at sequence level.
resolution_demands: Review all prior resolutions for mutual consistency.
Verify the sequence satisfies Kuleshov flow, excitation windows, emotional beat limits, and VISION duration.
downstream_proof: Emit a Constraint Resolution Manifest before the scene can be committed.

downstream_consumer.expected_input: A globally consistent sequence packet with no unresolved contradiction across prior gate resolutions.
downstream_consumer.failure_mode: Manifest assembly commits individually valid beats that fail as a sequence.

automated_checks.repair_hint: Reallocate duration so the ending snapshot has enough time to register.

constraint_a.statement: High-CLS beats must be followed by recovery space within the sequence.

constraint_b.statement: Sustained dramatic momentum may resist inserting low-load beats after peaks.

questions.tension: Recovery beats reduce momentum but prevent cognitive overload.
questions.failure_scenario: The sequence sustains CLS 4-5 runs without relief, causing processing collapse and dropout.
resolution_demands: Verify the CLS recovery ratio meets the threshold.
Confirm that any strategic mismatch is resolved within one beat.
downstream_proof: Emit cognitive rhythm validator score and per-gate verdicts.

downstream_consumer.expected_input: A sequence whose cognitive rhythm passes all five validator gates.
downstream_consumer.failure_mode: Manifest assembly commits a cognitively unsustainable sequence.

automated_checks.repair_hint: Insert a low-load clarifier, release beat, or pause within one beat of each CLS 4-5 spike.
Allocate the cleanest, most coherent scene templates and effect stacks to turning-point and ending beats.
Review the cognitive rhythm validator gate breakdown and address the lowest-scoring gate first.
